name: latitude
calculation_or_meaning: Latitude of the configured location, Ha Noi.

name: longitude
calculation_or_meaning: Longitude of the configured location, Ha Noi.

name: rain
calculation_or_meaning: Hourly rainfall from Open-Meteo, in mm.

name: temperature_2m
calculation_or_meaning: Air temperature at 2 meters from Open-Meteo, in degrees Celsius.

name: relative_humidity_2m
calculation_or_meaning: Relative humidity at 2 meters from Open-Meteo, in percent.

name: dew_point_2m
calculation_or_meaning: Dew point temperature at 2 meters from Open-Meteo, in degrees Celsius.

name: pressure_msl
calculation_or_meaning: Mean sea level pressure from Open-Meteo, in hPa.

name: surface_pressure
calculation_or_meaning: Surface pressure from Open-Meteo, in hPa.

name: wind_speed_10m
calculation_or_meaning: Wind speed at 10 meters from Open-Meteo, in km/h.

name: wind_direction_10m
calculation_or_meaning: Wind direction at 10 meters from Open-Meteo, in degrees.

name: wind_gusts_10m
calculation_or_meaning: Wind gusts at 10 meters from Open-Meteo, in km/h.

name: cloud_cover
calculation_or_meaning: Total cloud cover from Open-Meteo, in percent.

name: cloud_cover_low
calculation_or_meaning: Low-level cloud cover from Open-Meteo, in percent.

name: cloud_cover_mid
calculation_or_meaning: Mid-level cloud cover from Open-Meteo, in percent.

name: cloud_cover_high
calculation_or_meaning: High-level cloud cover from Open-Meteo, in percent.

name: et0_fao_evapotranspiration
calculation_or_meaning: Reference evapotranspiration from Open-Meteo FAO ET0, in mm.

name: vapour_pressure_deficit
calculation_or_meaning: Vapour pressure deficit from Open-Meteo, in kPa.

name: hour
calculation_or_meaning: Extracted from timestamp: hour of day, 0-23.

name: month
calculation_or_meaning: Extracted from timestamp: month of year, 1-12.

name: hour_sin
calculation_or_meaning: Cyclical hour encoding: sin(2 * pi * hour / 24).

name: hour_cos
calculation_or_meaning: Cyclical hour encoding: cos(2 * pi * hour / 24).

name: month_sin
calculation_or_meaning: Cyclical month encoding: sin(2 * pi * month / 12).

name: month_cos
calculation_or_meaning: Cyclical month encoding: cos(2 * pi * month / 12).

name: rain_lag_1h
calculation_or_meaning: Previous-hour rainfall for Ha Noi: rain.shift(1).

name: rain_lag_3h
calculation_or_meaning: Rainfall 3 hours earlier for Ha Noi: rain.shift(3).

name: rain_roll_sum_6h
calculation_or_meaning: Past 6-hour rainfall sum for Ha Noi, excluding current hour: rain.shift(1).rolling(6).sum().

name: rain_roll_sum_12h
calculation_or_meaning: Past 12-hour rainfall sum for Ha Noi, excluding current hour: rain.shift(1).rolling(12).sum().

name: temp_lag_1h
calculation_or_meaning: Previous-hour temperature for Ha Noi: temperature_2m.shift(1).

name: humidity_lag_1h
calculation_or_meaning: Previous-hour relative humidity for Ha Noi: relative_humidity_2m.shift(1).

name: dew_point_lag_1h
calculation_or_meaning: Previous-hour dew point for Ha Noi: dew_point_2m.shift(1).

name: cloud_cover_lag_1h
calculation_or_meaning: Previous-hour total cloud cover for Ha Noi: cloud_cover.shift(1).

name: target_rain_next_6h
calculation_or_meaning: Regression target: total rainfall from t+1 through t+6 hours.

name: target_rain_alert_6h
calculation_or_meaning: Binary alert target: 1 if target_rain_next_6h >= 1.0 mm, otherwise 0.
